reviews.feedback: PR links need to be clickable Markdown links, not just raw (#NNN) text. The skill should be more explicit about link formatting.
Flat bullet list with no categorization. No SemVer classification. Exactly the failure mode we expected.
Breaking changes need before/after code examples, not just prose migration steps. Also missing the compare link footer.
Breaking changes completely buried. No migration instructions. No security section. No CVE reference.
Missing urgency language for security advisory. Also should filter out test commits from user-facing changelog.
No advisory language, no severity, no affected versions. Test commit included. Basically a raw git log.
